message:
refactor(tests): replace unwrap with expect/expect_err across 10 modules

Continue the unwrap-removal pass (see d680bfd) for remaining test suites:
fleet_control_routes, fleet_quarantine, operator_routes, session_auth,
migration_pipeline, transition_abort, main init_tests,
optimization_governor, redteam_evaluations, and verifier_economy.
All .unwrap()/.unwrap_err() in test code now carry descriptive context
strings ("should succeed", "should fail", "should exist", "serialize",
"deserialize") for clearer panic messages on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
